query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'contacts' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%desc%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%bio%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%summary%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%note%' ORDER BY COLUMN_NAME
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'contacts' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%desc%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%bio%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%summary%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%note%' ORDER BY COLUMN_NAME
